warps.notes: Left exit door tile — returns to Route 34 warp 3 (x=11,y=14)
Left-center exit door tile — returns to Route 34 warp 4 (x=11,y=15)
Right exit tile — returns to Route 34 warp 5 (x=13,y=15)
Far-right exit tile — also returns to Route 34 warp 5 (x=13,y=15)

tile_layout.notes: 10 columns x 8 rows. Standard single-floor house interior. Bookshelf on north wall (x=0-1,y=1). Day Care Man stands at x=2,y=3 (only visible when EVENT_DAY_CARE_MAN_IN_DAY_CARE is set). Day Care Lady at x=5,y=3. Exit doors on south wall.

npcs.name: Day-Care Man (Gramps)
npcs.dialogue_summary: On first Crystal visit: explains about Eggs, offers the Odd Egg (gives it to player). On subsequent visits: uses special DayCareMan to handle the deposit/withdrawal of Pokemon and status report. If ENGINE_DAY_CARE_MAN_HAS_EGG is set, he is outside on Route 34 instead.

npcs.name: Day-Care Lady (Granny)
npcs.dialogue_summary: Uses special DayCareLady to handle Pokemon deposit/withdrawal for the second slot. If an Egg is ready (ENGINE_DAY_CARE_MAN_HAS_EGG), she says 'Gramps was looking for you.' instead of normal service.
special_functions: DayCareLady (regular service: deposit/withdraw for second slot)

items.name: Odd Egg
items.notes: Crystal exclusive. Day-Care Man offers the Odd Egg on first visit. Egg hatches into one of: Pichu, Cleffa, Igglybuff, Tyrogue, Smoochum, Elekid, or Magby. Has a 50% chance of being Shiny.

map_callbacks.notes: Mirrors the Route 34 callback. Checks ENGINE_DAY_CARE_MAN_HAS_EGG to determine whether Gramps is inside (EVENT_DAY_CARE_MAN_IN_DAY_CARE) or outside on Route 34 (EVENT_DAY_CARE_MAN_ON_ROUTE_34).

story_events.description: In Crystal, Day-Care Man tells the player about Eggs and gives them the Odd Egg (one of seven possible baby Pokemon, 50% Shiny chance). Requires empty party slot.
Player can deposit up to 2 Pokemon (one with Man, one with Lady). Pokemon gain 1 EXP per step taken outdoors. If two compatible species are left, they may produce an Egg.
story_events.notes: EXP formula: levels_gained = floor((steps_walked + deposited_level * 100) / 100). Pokemon may learn new moves while leveling up at Day Care.

story_events.description: When compatible pair produces an Egg, ENGINE_DAY_CARE_MAN_HAS_EGG is set. Day-Care Man comes outside on Route 34. Player must accept the Egg (requires empty party slot).

notes: The Day-Care Center is a 5x4 block (10x8 tile) single-floor interior building located on Route 34. It is the only breeding facility in Johto. The Day-Care Man handles depositing/withdrawing the first Pokemon; the Day-Care Lady handles the second slot. When an Egg is ready, the Day-Care Man appears on Route 34 outside and chases the player. The MAPCALLBACK_OBJECTS callback on both DAY_CARE and ROUTE_34 synchronizes the EVENT_DAY_CARE_MAN_IN_DAY_CARE and EVENT_DAY_CARE_MAN_ON_ROUTE_34 event flags. The bookshelf on the north wall uses the standard DifficultBookshelfScript.
